name: dreamweaverai-autolab
description: Unified plugin packaging for adapter-based idea-to-paper research autopilot, PaperBanana, AutoLab, AutoBaseline, built-in Nature Skills writing, local experiment recording, and the Matrix-AutoLab dashboard.

interface.shortDescription: Idea-to-paper and paper-to-experiment workflow with research search, experiments, Nature-style writing, figures, citations, and a local dashboard.
interface.longDescription: DreamweaverAI AutoLab packages Matrix Research Autopilot, PaperBanana, AutoLab, AutoBaseline, built-in Nature Skills, local .autolab recording utilities, and a read-only dashboard into one plugin. Use matrix-research-autopilot to move from a research idea to an adapter-based Research Discovery Layer, literature/code/data/baseline evidence, experiment planning, server execution, evidence-gated manuscript claims, and Nature-style writing assets. Use the built-in nature-writing, nature-figure, nature-citation, nature-data, nature-polishing, nature-reader, nature-response, nature-paper2ppt, and nature-academic-search skills for manuscript prose, publication figures, references, data availability, revision packages, paper reading, and presentations.
defaultPrompt: 我有一个研究想法，请使用 matrix-research-autopilot 完成搜索、实验计划、AutoLab 实验和 Nature 风格论文写作准备。
Use matrix-research-autopilot to turn my idea into evidence, experiments, supported claims, and Nature-style writing.
根据 writing_packet.md 使用 nature-writing、nature-figure、nature-citation 和 nature-data 准备论文写作层。
根据 main.tex 帮我完成论文方法实现、训练和相关消融实验。
使用 matrix-autolab 从上次确认的阶段继续我的 AutoLab 实验。
Use matrix-autolab to start a paper reproduction workflow.
Resume my AutoLab experiment from the last confirmed phase.
Run baseline comparison for my completed AutoLab project.
